'''''Challenge'' 61''' was a roleplaying magazine published in June [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The article was called ''[[Rogue Metal]]'' and was written by [[James B. King]].
